title: stelis nemoralis
intro: Stelis nemoralis, also known as the forest stelis or nemoralis orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its roots and leaves. Stelis nemoralis is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various diseases.
